info.title: Clover Platform API
info.description: The Clover Platform API provides RESTful access to Clover merchant data including orders, payments, inventory, customers, employees, and more. Used for POS integrations, ecommerce, and business management.

get.description: Returns a list of orders for the merchant.
Returns a list of line items for the merchant.
Returns a list of payments for the merchant.
Returns a list of refunds for the merchant.
Returns a list of customers for the merchant.
Returns a list of items for the merchant.
Returns a list of categorys for the merchant.
Returns a list of modifier groups for the merchant.
Returns a list of modifiers for the merchant.
Returns a list of tags for the merchant.
Returns a list of tax rates for the merchant.
Returns a list of item stocks for the merchant.
Returns a list of discounts for the merchant.
Returns a list of employees for the merchant.
Returns a list of shifts for the merchant.
Returns a list of roles for the merchant.
Returns a list of tenders for the merchant.
Returns a list of devices for the merchant.
Returns a list of cash events for the merchant.
Returns a list of service charges for the merchant.
Returns a list of order types for the merchant.
